headline: Ouster Inc. (OUST) Soars 26% on Lidar Sensor Family Development
summary: Ouster Inc. (NASDAQ:OUST) is one of the 10 Stocks With Easy Double-Digit Gains. headline: The Magnificent Seven Fell 40% While the S&P Dropped 18%: Here’s How Much Tech Concentration You Can Actually Afford
summary: I’ve been studying portfolio concentration for years, and one stat from Schwab’s On Investing podcast keeps echoing in my head. In 2022, the Magnificent Seven fell roughly 40% while the S&P 500 dropped 18%. Our data confirms the pain: SPY shed 20% that calendar year, while Meta Platforms (NASDAQ:META) collapsed 64%, NVIDIA (NASDAQ:NVDA) fell 51%, ... The Magnificent Seven Fell 40% While the S&P Dropped 18%: Here’s How Much Tech Concentration You Can Actually Afford

headline: Wall Street Is Worried About a ‘Sizzling’ Semiconductor Trade. History Says Cooling Periods Like This Set Up the Next Leg Higher

A Reuters analysis is warning that the “sizzling” semiconductor trade is at risk of cooling and could stall the broader US stocks rally. The iShares Semiconductor ...
